package.name: welding_seam_skill
package.description:
Mock implementation of the "execute weld seam" skill. Lifecycle action server that simulates executing a Cartesian weld trajectory. Mock: 6 s with IGNITING → WELDING × 3 → FINISHING phase feedback. Also handles START_PROCESS intent (routed by the supervisor).
ros4hri compliance: conceptually implements motion_skills/ExecuteCartesianTrajectory.
